conversation_history.content: I'm building a web app with React and Node.js

{"response_type": "threat_modeling", "analysis": "You mentioned building a web application using React for the front\u2011end and Node.js for the back\u2011end. To create a meaningful threat model, I need more details about the architecture, data flows, and security controls you plan to use.", "completeness_score": 0.2, "missing_info": ["Overall system architecture (e.g., single\u2011page app, microservices, API gateway)", "Data types handled (PII, credentials, payment info, etc.)", "Authentication and authorization mechanisms", "Network exposure (public internet, internal network, VPN, etc.)", "Third\u2011party integrations (payment processors, external APIs, analytics)", "Compliance or regulatory requirements (GDPR, HIPAA, PCI\u2011DSS, SOC\u202f2, etc.)", "Use of any AI/ML components"], "follow_up_questions": ["What are the main components of your application (e.g., front\u2011end, API server, database, external services) and how do they interact?", "What types of data will your application store or process (e.g., user credentials, personal data, financial transactions)?", "Which authentication and authorization methods will you employ (e.g., OAuth2, JWT, session cookies, multi\u2011factor authentication)?"], "ready_for_threat_model": false, "confidence_level": "medium", "uncertainty_notes": [], "world_model": {"system_type": "web application", "components": [], "data_types": [], "auth_method": "", "network_exposure": "", "compliance": [], "ai_involved": false}, "sources": [], "web_search_used": false, "reasoning_level": "balanced", "reasoning_summary": {"key_steps": [], "assumptions": [], "evidence_used": [], "confidence": "medium"}}
